reviews.review_description: I have played free version of cover drive 22 which is much better version and UI is smooth and clear but this paid is worst and doesn’t support at all
On side quest, can find the game but won't download Edit is resolved and game is amazing thank you

developer_response.body: Hi deanjamesallen, there has been a known issue with Oculus recently that's caused trouble downloading and installing games, but this should be resolved now. If this is still happening, please reach out on Discord or at coverdrive@mphillips.io and I'll do what I can to help!

reviews.review_description:
I really liked the free demo so I was always going to purchase this when it became fully available. 

Still work to do, however the flight of the ball is really good. From leaving the bowlers hand to hitting the bat it’s spot on.  It does however go a little downhill from there with some very unrealistic mechanics with the ball flying for six with a simple flick of the wrists.   Graphics need some work too. 

All of this will be updated and improved upon as the dev(s) are very active and passionate about their  product on their Discord channel. 

For those that love cricket I think this is a great accompaniment to the other cricket game out there that is perhaps more polished but for me not quite the simulation this game is and trying to be

Bravo! I look forward to further updates!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, glad to hear you're loving it so far :) Regarding the ball flying off the bat: the ball receives a helpful boost at lower difficulty levels, but it should be more realistic at higher difficulty levels. Obviously we'll look into it if it's not correct!

reviews.review_description:
Thank for fixing up the user entitlement issue in such short time. Regarding the game I think this is the best game where i can really feel the connect with the ball. I use a real bat attached to my controller and there is no better game for me on that aspect. The fielding is the worst part of the game IMO and giving 4 stars only for that. The fielding is like almost non existent, unless the ball stops on its own. Also I wish i can rename the batsman. i could not find that option. No other complaints with the game for me. Great job!

Edit: the issue is back again. can you please provide a perm fix for this user entitlement issue? i dont want to update my comment to reach you for support. please

reviews.review_title: Great start but has developement stopped
reviews.review_description:
Edit - now dropping down to 4 stars, mainly because nothing has changed for months. Very playable game and the last update several months ago improved it further. But… there’s been nothing since. Some minor updates would help - the ability to edit player names would be nice. Some tournaments/leagues maybe. Changing field positions. Etc etc.

It is a 4/5 star game still, but the lack of developments is letting it down. I haven’t encountered any major issues though.



This will be my first Oculus Quest game review. I played the free demo and thought it was pretty good, but wanted more. The Odi game mode is great. It’s very satisfying to hit the perfect shot with the middle of the bat.
I’ve given this a 5 star review as I love playing it, but there are many improvements that could be made to make it better... little things would help - custom player names and teams etc... as well as bigger things; improved movement, adding more detail - proper wicket keeper, umpires, the other batter. As well as more game modes, leagues, tournaments etc...

I hope there’s more to come, but if I’m honest, I’ll carry on playing regardless - I still have the higher difficulty levels to go yet.

developer_response.body: Hey TommyAwesome83! Great timing - we've just released our bumper xmas update! I know it was a while coming, but we hope you find it worth the wait and we promise that our New Year's resolution will be to drop updates faster!  🙏

reviews.review_description: Ever since the recent upgrade, the game play is getting bit glitchy.

developer_response.body: Hey anuragranjan, sorry to hear this! Would you mind letting me know what issues you're having and I'll fix them asap. Please drop me an email (mark@coverdrive.cricket) or come join our Discord (https://discord.coverdrive.cricket) 🙏

reviews.review_description:
It's a great game. Comes close to playing in real.
Have few feedbacks.
1. Will love a test match version with two innings and unlimited overs. 
2. Have the bowlers bowl at max 3 over spells. For ex., In odi, 2 bowlers bowl first 10. We will like another variation introduced say at 6 overs mark. Gameplay becomes interesting.
3. Intelligent field placing.if for 10 overs we fixate on a shot for a given bowler take that info in real time and adjust fielding to make it real.
4. Commentary
5. Multi player? For ex., Me and my friend would love to string a partnership together in our respective Oculus. Ability to discuss while we play makes it interesting.
Coloured kits, iconoic stadiums like lords Eden gardens, Melbourne etc

Overall best vr cricketing app that exist

developer_response.body:
🙌 That's what we're aiming for!

1. Test matches are currently in beta testing, and will be available soon.
2. Bowlers now also bowl in spells of varying length, depending on how many runs they concede - a bowler you hit for 10-15 in an over is much less likely to come back for another!
3. Smart field placements are also in beta and should be available soon - fielders should move around to the areas where you hit the ball the most.
4. It's on the list!
5. PvP multiplayer is in beta testing, but there's not a co-op mode (yet!). It does have in-game chat though 👍 Coloured kits are on the to-do list, as are more stadiums. We'll get there though!

Really glad you're loving Cover Drive Cricket!

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic game ,feels like having a proper net .
A few things that would make it a 5 star game .

Ability to put own name in batting order. 
Ability to bowl and field .

A competition would also be amazing. 

Well done developers , keep the updates coming

developer_response.body: Thanks oneleggedwarrior, really glad you're enjoying Cover Drive Cricket and we'll work try and include these suggestions in the future! :)

reviews.review_description:
Writing while game is still in early access so please bear that in mind - I'm sure developers will tweak it in the future. 4 stars for now but will upgrade to 5 stars if below issues are addressed in subsequent updates.

This game has fantastic potential, and is a must buy for cricket fans. 

However, an issue I have encountered as a left-handed batsmen is that the bowlers bowl chronically down leg side. During play I will often have every second or third ball go for 5 wides, and almost every shot I play is on the leg side. I also sometimes see the slip fielder on the leg side instead of the off side. I have checked I have settings on left handed.

It seems like the code is still oriented around right-hands batsmen only and the bowling algo is not yet properly adapted to left handers. I really hope they fix this as I am excited to play the game and it fells great when I do get the occasional playable delivery. Probably not an issue for right-handers but left handers may need to wait for future patches.

Great work guys. Been waiting for a great cricket VR game and yours has great potential.

developer_response.body: Hi LT3000, when I designed the bowling system in CDC I made sure it would work equally for left- and right-handed batters. It seems like a recent change broke this though, and being a right-handed batter I missed it in testing - apologies for this! This should have been fixed in the latest release now though 👍

reviews.review_description: I had been going through quite a rough spot in the last few games and then i played this again and i managed to rediscover my old form and i have hd an average of 163 in the last 4 games after i had tried it. I know its just a game, but it can really help aswell, would definitely recommend.
Just a great cricket sim. Really good tracking of the bat and some of the best physics I've seen/felt in VR.

Been playing this on working from home lunches and it's been great. Couple of things I've noticed is you can turn sound off but not just the music. I'm not in the menu for long but would be nice to just get rid of the music and keeping in game sound.
Also I've noticed an defect around bounces. If you hit the ball on the volley and it bounces once before going to a fielder/keeper it counts the bounce after the bat hit as the pitch bounce and considers it as out. Have also got some 1 bounces 6's due to this!
Much better than the other cricket quest game though!

developer_response.body: Thanks Greavous! Really happy to hear that you're enjoying Cover Drive Cricket, and we'll look into those issues 👍

reviews.review_description: Hi Devs. You have done such a great job, I really want to thank you for that. I was playing other cricket game on quest during lockdown which has very unrealistic physics. When I started playing real cricket in April my batting was really messed up. I deleted the game and decided not to play cricket on vr again. Within couple of day I came across CDC and gave it a try and was amazed with the realistic physics. It helped me very much in fixing my timing and front foot defence in just few days. Really happy now that vr cricket is helping me train for real cricket. Looking forward for a lot of new features especially training on selected deliveries like yorkers and short balls.

developer_response.body: Amazing to hear, hhhafg! 🙌 You can use practice mode to face specific deliveries already, but improvements are coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
🔥25% OFF🔥: http://tiny.cc/coverdrive

Are you a cricket fan looking for an immersive and thrilling gaming experience? Look no further than Cover Drive Cricket!🤩

This game is a must-play for all cricket lovers. With stunning graphics and realistic gameplay, you'll feel like you're right in the middle of the action.👀🎮

The controls are intuitive and easy to learn, so you can jump right in and start scoring big. And with a variety of game modes, including quick matches and full tournaments, you'll never get bored.👌

And the best part? By using my REFERRAL LINK, http://tiny.cc/coverdrive you can get a massive 25% off your purchase! 😱💰

A lot of different modes and bowling to keep you entertained for hours.a classic version of cricket to enjoy .a great way enjoy the lockdown when you can’t get out to play real cricket.the game is in development so the game is only going to get better.a no brainer for cricket lovers

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, glad to hear you're loving it so far! :)

reviews.review_description: Update has bugs. It just freezes in the middle of the game and one has to start over. It's a paid game and a big disappointment that has started after the updates. It was amazing and worked flawlessly before that. Developers needs to focus on fixing the crashes.

developer_response.body: Hi there, I've made a load of fixes recently, so hopefully these issues have gone away now 🙏 Please let me know via Discord if there's any more issues

reviews.review_description: Hi, I have been playing this game for a while now and was really enjoying it. I too a few weeks break and came back to a new update and it has literally broke the game. The bounce for the spinners in unrealistic and middling the ball is almost impossible. The difficulty level is through the roof compared to last patch and the game just isn't fun anymore. Thai should have been a 1 start review, but I am giving 3 starts because I originally did love the game and issue is only with the current patch

developer_response.body: Hi abhijatranade, thanks for your feedback! I've made a load of fixes since this review - do you feel this is still the case?

reviews.review_description: Played just over an hour- feels really good- virtual net at home! Any chance of a bat controller add on? :-)

developer_response.body:
Thanks Mjolnir83, really glad you're enjoying it :)

You can already attach the controller to the bat without needing a special attachment - just drop the controller down over the handle and use a little bit of tape to hold it steady!

reviews.review_title: Must have for VR cricket fans
reviews.review_description:
It took a while to get used to it (spent most of the time in the demo frustrated, missing balls that I thought I would hit etc) but having put an hour or 2 into it, I LOVE THIS GAME! 

I'm a massive cricket fan and this game takes some getting used to but man is it worth it!

I'm very excited to see how this game develops and even if nothing changes, I'm still very happy with my purchase.

I also tried the other cricket vr game and thought it was rubbish compared to this one.

developer_response.body: 🙌 We're so glad you're enjoying it, JevJevs!

reviews.review_description:
I tried the demo version prior to paying up for the full version. The demo version had a smppther experience whereas the full version has a number issues, user experience/comfort is poor.
Disappointed that there's such a variation between Demo and the full version.

Wish they had a money back option, I'll ask for a refund

developer_response.body:
Edit: Hey IzzyonVR, just wondering if you've found that the new update has helped to fix these issues? 

---------------

Hi IzzyonVR, 

I released an update at the end of January with a few changes to how the game is rendered to try and allow people to try out SpaceWarp. Unfortunately, this also ended up bringing in a load of performance issues that I'm trying to iron out as quickly as possible. 

The next release should bring the quality bar back up to the high standard again, but please accept my apologies in the meantime!

Mark
